task: Type-3 DFIG LVRT GUI signal semantic confirmation

logic_direction.1: crowbar power electronic switch commanded active/on

intermediate_signals.Iovercur: rotor-current over-limit comparator output; not actual crowbar state
intermediate_signals.Reset: reset/control signal in latch/monostable chain; not actual crowbar state
intermediate_signals.Mono_out: monostable output; not final crowbar switch state

crowbar.current_semantics: confirmed as crowbar branch current; exact sign direction not visually confirmed
crowbar.deep_fault_run_interpretation: S1 remained 0 and Crowbar current was near zero, so no confirmed crowbar conduction in the current 5 s deep-fault run.

vdc_base.gui_source: Type3_WTG_Avg outer page constant connected to Vdc_Base

static_evidence: DFIG_Converters_Avg.f:553 CALL ChopperDyn(Ecap_fltrd, Vdc_chop_on, Vdc_chop_off, R_chopper)
remaining_limitations: Physical chopper energy dissipation still requires branch current or resistor power if needed.

I_RS.semantic: rotor-side converter / rotor-side terminal three-phase current
I_RS.phase_mapping: vector indices 1..3 follow PSCAD three-phase vector ordering; exact A/B/C naming not separately confirmed

Iconv.gui_direction: arrow from SABC/AC-filter side toward grid-side converter
Iconv.phase_mapping: vector indices 1..3 follow PSCAD three-phase vector ordering; exact A/B/C naming not separately confirmed

Crowbar current.phase_mapping: vector indices 1..3 follow PSCAD three-phase vector ordering; exact A/B/C naming not separately confirmed

can_upgrade: S1 is the formal DFIG_CROWBAR_STATE signal.
Ecap_Det is DC-link voltage in kV.
Edc_pu is DC-link per-unit voltage using Vdc_base = 1.45 kV.
BRK_CHOP = 1 is chopper switch command/state active.
I_RS and Iconv are RSC and GSC terminal current channels.
Crowbar current:1..3 is crowbar branch current.
must_remain_qualified: Exact A/B/C mapping of vector channels 1..3.
Physical chopper energy dissipation without branch current/resistor power.
No claim of crowbar action in the current 5 s deep-fault run.
